domains.name: Recovery Stability
objectives: Maintain abstinence or reduced use for the next review period
interventions: Review relapse prevention plan each session
Coordinate with community supports or recovery meetings

domains.name: Mental Health Regulation
objectives: Reduce frequency or intensity of anxiety symptoms
Improve mood stability and daily functioning
Increase use of grounding and self-regulation skills
interventions: Monitor sleep, stress, and symptom patterns

domains.name: Life Functioning
objectives: Increase stability in work, school, or housing
interventions: Build a weekly structure and accountability plan
